name: Zucchini-Ricotta-Frittata
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh basil (or 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add zucchini slices and sauté until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in shallot and garlic; cook for an additional minute.
4. Season with salt.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, egg whites, ricotta cheese, Parmesan, parsley, chives, basil (or dried basil), and black pepper.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the zucchini and gently stir to distribute evenly.
7. Cook on low heat until the edges set but the center remains slightly runny, about 5 minutes.
8. Remove from heat; let stand for a minute before serving.
